_comment: PHP Desktop configuration for Arya Pharma Manager. Place this next to phpdesktop-chrome.exe and put the www/ folder alongside it.
_scan_with_phone_note: The default listen_on 127.0.0.1 keeps the app private to this PC. To use Scan-with-Phone, change listen_on to ["0.0.0.0", 8666] so phones on the same Wi-Fi can reach scan.php, and allow the port in Windows Firewall.
